task.title: Analyze openclaw separation of concerns and propose SDK bridge API

events.content: Treat openclaw package as overloaded; keep @relaycast/openclaw limited to config/env/bridge/types and move orchestration to @agent-relay/openclaw: Treat openclaw package as overloaded; keep @relaycast/openclaw limited to config/env/bridge/types and move orchestration to @agent-relay/openclaw

raw.question: Treat openclaw package as overloaded; keep @relaycast/openclaw limited to config/env/bridge/types and move orchestration to @agent-relay/openclaw
raw.chosen: Treat openclaw package as overloaded; keep @relaycast/openclaw limited to config/env/bridge/types and move orchestration to @agent-relay/openclaw
raw.reasoning: Current index exports include setup/runtime/spawn/MCP/identity/auth concerns and dependency on @agent-relay/sdk, which violates SDK-bridge boundary

retrospective.summary: Delivered separation-of-concerns analysis for openclaw package: current strengths, missing SDK primitives, proposed @relaycast/openclaw API, and required breaking changes for package split
